top.title: PAAN
top.description: PAAN Co., Ltd. corporate website. Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered, beyond the walls of language and culture. Co-founded by Rokusaburo Inui (Representative Director) and Koki Yui (General Counsel) on 3 June 2026.
top.hero_title: Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered.
top.hero_sub:
The dishes we wish to taste, the drinks we long for, the aromas we wish to feel, the tables we wish to touch.
The walls of language and culture between them, we shall surmount with technology and artificial intelligence.
top.news_2026_05_10_info: Our corporate website is now live.
top.news_2026_04_18_story:
On the return journey aboard the Hokuriku Shinkansen, after a day trip to Iwase, Toyama.
Rokusaburo Inui and Koki Yui, the co-founders, resolved to establish PAAN Co., Ltd.

mission.title: PAAN
mission.description: Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered. Restaurants have crossed borders, but dishes have not. Through technology and AI, we bridge cultures through food.
mission.page_title:
Crossing the walls of language and culture,
we open the road to dishes yet to be seen.
mission.question_h: Restaurants have crossed borders. But dishes?
mission.question_p1: Michelin, Tabelog, TripAdvisor. — Over a hundred years, the "information" about restaurants has spread across the world. And yet, the dishes themselves have not yet crossed over.
mission.question_p2: At a restaurant abroad, you halt before the menu. In the end you order a dish you have had before — then your eyes drift to the next table, and you discover an unknown dish that looks delicious. ── Are we truly meeting the dishes we longed for?
mission.regrets_h: The many regrets that stand before the meal.
mission.story1_lead: The long-awaited overseas trip — and the very first dinner.
mission.story1_p: You gather your courage and step into a restaurant featured in the guidebook. You open the menu. ── You cannot picture what will arrive. In the end, half-doubting, you order. The dish that comes is nothing like you imagined — a wry smile escapes you. Glancing at the next table's plate, you murmur, "that's what I really wanted to eat."
mission.story_coda: — A night standing still before a street stall's sign. A night when the drink you longed for never appeared. A meal slowly given up on, in the face of dietary needs. A restaurateur who cannot properly welcome the foreign guest who has just passed under the noren. These regrets — these we take on.
mission.approach_h: Beyond the wall, we open the road.
mission.approach_p1: The walls to be crossed are not one. The wall of language. The wall of culture. And the wall of distance. It is what stands in the way of the connection between information and people, and of access to the dishes themselves.
mission.approach_p2: With the power of technology and AI, we open the road, one by one. Through food, we move towards a world where people and people, culture and culture, meet one step more deeply.
mission.first_h: Our first challenge: beyond the menu.
mission.first_p1: The other side of the menu — it is a world of dishes that words alone cannot reach.
mission.first_p2: At any restaurant anywhere in the world, simply photograph the menu. Understanding it completely, order the dish you envisioned, with confidence.
mission.name_h: The Origin of the Name PAAN
mission.name_p1: Food is the most universal of experiences — connecting people across nationality, language, and culture. We want to play the part of sweeping away, with a light "paan," the walls that stand at its threshold.
mission.name_origin1: The Eastern "汎 (han)" — to spread far and wide, to reach everywhere
mission.name_origin3: And the fleeting onomatopoeia of a wall coming lightly down
mission.name_p2: These are the thoughts we have woven into the name PAAN.

brand.title: PAAN
brand.description: Products by PAAN Co., Ltd. We are preparing a series of scene-specific products to realise encounters — between people, between cultures — through food.
brand.menupaan_desc: Order with confidence at any restaurant on your travels. A Consumer-facing app.
brand.others_desc: Welcome international guests with confidence the moment they step through your doors. A Restaurant-facing app.
brand.productc_desc: Find your restaurant by the dish you crave. A new dining-discovery site. A Consumer-facing app.
brand.productd_desc: Discover the wine and sake you long to savor. A Consumer-facing app.
brand.producte_desc: Effortless inventory management for your wine, sake and whisky. A Restaurant-facing app.

company.title: PAAN
company.description: Company information and officers of PAAN Co., Ltd.
company.biz_1_sub: With the power of technology and AI, through food, we cross the walls of language and culture. The PAAN Series — supporting both travellers and restaurants.
company.biz_2_sub: Multilingual menus, order management, customer insight — the foundation for restaurant operations that respond to guests from across borders.
company.biz_3_strong: Research and development at the intersection of food and AI
company.biz_3_sub: Understanding the cultural context of dishes, translation that bridges image and language, and machine understanding of food habits — applied AI research in the realm of food.
company.biz_4_sub: We accept consultations for small-scale IT introductions tailored to the needs of restaurants.
company.founder_inui_bio:
Born in July 1996. Graduated from Keio Senior High School in 2015 and from Keio University, Faculty of Law (Political Science), in 2019. Joined the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan as a career-track officer (Sōgō-shoku, formerly Class I), serving on the Korea and Philippines desks at headquarters, before being posted to the Embassy of Japan in the United Kingdom as Attaché and later Second Secretary, where he handled economic and diplomatic affairs.

In June 2025, he left the Ministry to take up the position of Managing Director (fourth generation) at Kushinobo Co., Ltd., a kushikatsu specialist restaurant group founded in 1950. His experience as a diplomat and as a restaurateur led to the conception of the Company's business.

Co-founded PAAN Co., Ltd. in June 2026.
company.founder_yui_bio:
Born July 1996. Graduated from Keio Senior High School in 2015. While studying at the Faculty of Law (Law), Keio University, passed the preliminary bar examination in 2018, and the bar examination the following year.

Upon registration as a lawyer (Daini Tokyo Bar Association) in 2021, joined ZeLo, Law Office, specialising in start-up finance, public affairs and general corporate matters, providing legal advisory drawing on both public- and private-sector insight. After serving in the Innovation and Environmental Policy Bureau of the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (Innovation and New Business Development Office), joined Fugen Law Office.

In June 2026, co-founded PAAN Co., Ltd.

contact.title: PAAN
contact.description: Get in touch with PAAN Co., Ltd. We welcome enquiries on partnership, media, and future recruitment.
contact.lead: For partnerships, media enquiries and other matters, please contact us at the email address below. Once we have reviewed your message, a member of our team will respond.
contact.email_note: We aim to respond within three business days (Mon-Fri, excluding public holidays). For urgent matters, or if you do not receive a reply within a reasonable time, we kindly ask you to send your message again.
contact.inquiry_1_body: We welcome partnerships with restaurants, travel and tourism providers, local governments, media, and companies in the translation and AI sectors.
contact.inquiry_2_body: For press, articles, and speaking engagements, please include your outlet, scope, and proposed dates.
contact.inquiry_3_body: We are not currently engaged in regular recruitment. Should you be interested in joining us, please reach out with a brief summary of your background. We may be able to get back to you when we begin hiring.
contact.inquiry_4_body: For enquiries about our products, please contact us at the email address above.

message.title: PAAN
message.description: A message from Rokusaburo Inui, CEO of PAAN Co., Ltd., on the founding of the company and the journey ahead.
message.body:
I stepped down from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and joined the company that my grandfather and father had carried forward, moving from diplomacy into the world of food and dining. And yet, my wish to be of service to Japan and to the world remained entirely unchanged. If the people of the world could meet one another more deeply, surely the world would become richer for it. That is what I had come to believe.

One answer to that conviction was a bridge between cultures, drawn through food.

A place where, beyond borders and beyond language, culture meets culture through a single dish. To respond, one product at a time, to the many walls and many distances that stand before the meal. It is from this aspiration that PAAN Co., Ltd. was born.

Beginning with our first product, we will give shape, one by one, to the PAAN Series.

Alone, I could not have reached this place. My co-founder, Koki Yui. As a lawyer, as an entrepreneur, and above all as a friend — the first to embrace my vision. It was his conviction and encouragement that allowed me to take this first step.

We have only just begun to walk. But the road ahead is clear. Crossing the walls of language and culture, we open the path to dishes yet undiscovered — and to that end, we will give shape to one product after another.

To all who delight in food, may you meet the dish you have yet to discover. Through food, towards a world where people and people, culture and culture, meet one step more deeply.
